user_scenarios.user_goal: As an ai_infra wiki maintainer, verify that Kubernetes, Volcano, and Kueue closed GitHub issues have been captured as raw evidence, curated into wiki pages, and scheduled for monthly synchronization.
prerequisites: Python dependencies for the crawler workbench backend tests are available.
The initial GitHub closed issue seed corpus has been captured under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/github/.
user_scenarios.entrypoint: bash -lc 'pytest -q scripts/tests/test_github_closed_issues_corpus.py && cd personal-wiki/apps/crawler_workbench/backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_api.py tests/test_db_profiles.py tests/test_fetchers.py && cd /home/fyz/codex-skills/.worktrees/github-closed-issues-k8s-volcano-kueue && python3 scripts/github_closed_issues_corpus.py verify-manifest --repo-root . --manifest .codex/github-closed-issues/github-closed-issues-k8s-volcano-kueue-01/manifest.json --min-repos 3 && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra'
steps: Run crawler workbench backend tests covering source profile loading, DB profiles, and fetchers.
Verify the GitHub closed issue corpus manifest.
Inspect the source profiles for monthly closed-issue GitHub URLs with env-token auth.
Inspect wiki index and curated pages for Kubernetes, Volcano, Kueue, and the shared closed-issues reference.
Inspect raw summaries to confirm each target repository has captured closed issues and partial reasons.
expected_outcomes: The three source profiles exist with schedule=monthly, run_policy=scheduled, auth_method=env_token, auth_ref=GITHUB_TOKEN, and URLs containing state=closed.
The manifest verifies at least three repositories and every raw path exists.
Each target repository has a raw summary, index, joined issue/comment gzip file, issue API pages gzip file, comments API pages gzip file, and ingest plan.
The curated wiki index lists Kubernetes, Volcano, Kueue, and the shared GitHub closed issues reference.
The shared reference records that the initial corpus is partial and does not present the seed capture as a full historical backfill.
No GitHub token value or Authorization header value is committed.
failure_signals: A source profile is missing, not monthly, lacks env-token metadata, or omits state=closed.
Manifest verification fails or any repository has zero captured issues.
Raw file names do not match the closed-issue corpus contract.
Wiki validation reports missing source_refs or broken links.
The curated wiki pages claim full corpus coverage despite partial summaries.
A token value is present in tracked files.
cleanup: Remove .codex/evaluations/tasks/github-closed-issues-k8s-volcano-kueue-01/ if a clean evaluator rerun is needed.
